quoteLast: , Dr. Blake, feeling a cross between a detective and a burglar, stole through the alley which backed the Markham residence, crossed the area, knocked softly at the kitchen door.
title: The House of Mystery: An Episode in the Career of Rosalie Le Grange, Clairvoyant
author: Irwin, Will, 1873-1948; Yohn, F. C. (Frederick Coffay), 1875-1933 [Illustrator]
